data.title: Warner Music Q3 sales exceed estimates, revenue up 9% to $1.69B. Net loss at $16M. Stock gains on results.
data.description: Warner Music Group (NASDAQ: WMG) saw its stock rise following the release of its fiscal third-quarter 2025 earnings report. The company reported a GAAP EPS loss of 3 cents, falling short of the analyst consensus estimate of 27 cents. However, revenue for the quarter exceeded expectations, growing by 9% year-on-year to $1.69 billion, surpassing the analyst consensus estimate of $1.59 billion. The Recorded Music segment saw revenue increase by 8% Y/Y to $1.35 billion, while Music Publishing revenue grew by 10% Y/Y to $336 million. Digital revenue also saw a rise of 5.3% Y/Y to $1.13 billion. Despite the revenue growth, Warner Music Group reported a net loss of $16 million, a significant decline from the net income of $141 million in the same quarter last year. This downward trend was attributed to... (Further details can be found on Benzinga.com)

data.title: Europe meat snacks market set to reach $6.9 billion by 2033, with French and German markets leading innovation and gourmet offerings.
data.description: In Dublin, the Europe meat snacks market is thriving, as per a report titled "Europe Meat Snacks Market Size and Share Analysis - Growth Trends and Forecast Report 2025-2033". The market was valued at US$ 2.99 billion in 2024 and is anticipated to exhibit a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 9.79% from 2025 to 2033. It is projected to soar to US$ 6.9 billion by 2033. This growth is attributed to the increasing demand for convenient high-protein snacks for on-the-go consumption and a preference for natural, minimally processed food products among consumers.

data.title: "Dairy alternatives market to reach $83.94 billion in 2033 from $32.24 billion in 2024, 11.22% CAGR growth - ResearchAndMarkets"
data.description: The report "Dairy Alternatives Market Size and Share Analysis - Growth Trends and Forecast Report 2025-2033" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The Dairy Alternative Market is projected to grow significantly, with an estimated value of US$ 83.94 billion in 2033, up from US$ 32.24 billion in 2024. This growth is expected to occur at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 11.22% from 2025 to 2033. Factors such as increasing consumer emphasis on sustainability and health, along with the introduction of innovative product options, are the key drivers behind the expansion of the dairy alternatives market. The market expansion is primarily due to the rising demand for plant-based dairy alternatives.

data.title: Planview recognized as a Leader in Strategic Portfolio Management by Gartner for 2025, marking fourth consecutive year.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Planview has been recognized as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Strategic Portfolio Management (SPM), marking the fourth consecutive year of recognition. As a top platform for Strategic Portfolio Management and Digital Product Development, Planview received the highest position for both Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute indices. This achievement solidifies Planview's position as a leading provider in the industry.

data.description: Yatra Online (YTRA), listed on NASDAQ, is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on Friday, August 8, 2025. Analysts project an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.03 for the company. Investors are eager to see if Yatra Online surpasses this estimate and look for other positive updates in the upcoming announcement. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: OneShield launches industry's 1st AI Hub for secure AI development in insurance, aiming to accelerate innovation.
data.description: In Marlborough, Massachusetts, OneShield, a prominent provider of core insurance technology solutions for property and casualty insurers and MGAs, introduced the OneShield AI Hub. This is notable as the industry's initial centralized setting for the safe creation, implementation, and management of artificial intelligence solutions within the insurance software sector. This hub will function as a secure, centralized space where OneShield's staff, clients, and partners can collaboratively engage in the development and deployment of AI solutions.

data.title: QSR stock drops as Burger King's parent company misses earnings with $2.41B sales, 5.3% growth, and 2.4% comp sales.
data.description: Shares of Restaurant Brands International Inc. (NYSE: QSR) are down as they reported second-quarter adjusted earnings per share of 94 cents, falling short of the expected 96 cents. However, quarterly sales reached $2.41 billion, surpassing the anticipated $2.31 billion. Consolidated system-wide sales saw a 5.3% increase year-over-year, including a substantial 9.8% jump in International markets. Comparable sales rose by 2.4%, led by Burger King International with a 4.1% increase and Tim Hortons Canada with a 3.6% rise. Adjusted Operating Income for the quarter totaled...
